## CSSDirective.createCSS() method

Creates static styles to interpolate into the CSS document.

**Signature:**

```typescript
createCSS(): ComposableStyles;
```
**Returns:**

[ComposableStyles](../fast-element.composablestyles/)

- the styles to interpolate into CSS
